nodes.name: read_file_tests.rs
nodes.summary: Integration tests for the read_file tool — exercises full read, offset/limit windowing, and nonexistent-file error paths via a Mutex<HashMap> mock Backend.

nodes.name: ReadMockBackend
nodes.summary: Mock Backend storing files in a Mutex<HashMap>; only read() has real behavior, other ops return defaults.

nodes.name: test_read_full_file
nodes.summary: Asserts ReadFileTool returns all lines with line numbers in Text result.

nodes.name: test_read_with_offset_limit
nodes.summary: Validates offset+limit windowing returns only the requested line range.

nodes.name: test_read_nonexistent_file
nodes.summary: Asserts that reading a missing file produces a Text error result.

nodes.name: tool_dispatch_tests.rs
nodes.summary: Integration tests for BuiltinTool/AnyTool dispatch, dynamic tool wrapping, parallel execution, and ToolRuntime construction (ADR-103 A6/A2).

nodes.name: MockBackend
nodes.summary: Minimal Backend mock with canned responses for every backend op.

nodes.name: EchoTool
nodes.summary: Dynamic Tool impl used to exercise AnyTool::Dynamic branch.

nodes.name: test_builtin_tool_enum_dispatch
nodes.summary: Resolves every builtin name and checks name/description/schema invariants.

nodes.name: test_any_tool_builtin_vs_dynamic
nodes.summary: Exercises AnyTool::Builtin and AnyTool::Dynamic variants through invoke().

nodes.name: test_parallel_tool_execution
nodes.summary: Tokio test that ls and grep ToolCalls execute_tools_parallel returns results in order.

nodes.name: test_tool_runtime_creation
nodes.summary: Verifies a fresh ToolRuntime has null context and no tool_call_id/stream_writer/store.

nodes.name: write_file_tests.rs
nodes.summary: Integration tests for WriteFileTool covering new-file writes, overwrite rejection, directory traversal blocking, missing-arg errors, and special-character payloads.

nodes.name: WriteMockBackend
nodes.summary: Backend mock whose write() rejects '..' paths and existing files, simulating the real safety behavior.

nodes.name: test_write_new_file_to_temp_directory
nodes.summary: Writes a fresh file and confirms successful persistence.

nodes.name: test_write_file_overwrite_existing_fails
nodes.summary: Confirms attempts to overwrite produce an 'already exists' error and preserve original content.

nodes.name: test_write_file_with_proper_content
nodes.summary: Validates multi-line content is stored verbatim.

nodes.name: test_write_file_error_on_directory_traversal
nodes.summary: Asserts '..' path attempts are rejected with an invalid-path error.

nodes.name: test_write_file_empty_content
nodes.summary: Confirms zero-length content is a valid write.

nodes.name: test_write_file_missing_file_path
nodes.summary: Asserts missing file_path returns a required-field error.

nodes.name: test_write_file_missing_content
nodes.summary: Asserts missing content returns a required-field error.

nodes.name: test_write_file_special_characters_in_content
nodes.summary: Confirms tabs, quotes, and backslashes pass through writes unchanged.

nodes.name: write_todos_tests.rs
nodes.summary: Integration tests for WriteTodosTool covering valid lists, status transitions, validation rules (at-most-one in_progress, status enum), and JSON serde edge cases.

nodes.name: TodoMockBackend
nodes.summary: Minimal Backend mock since write_todos does not touch the filesystem.

nodes.name: test_write_todo_list_with_multiple_items
nodes.summary: Round-trips a 3-item todo list and confirms each field on the state update.

nodes.name: test_update_todo_status_from_pending_to_completed
nodes.summary: Confirms status transitions appear correctly on the resulting StateUpdate.

nodes.name: test_empty_todo_list_handling
nodes.summary: Empty todo list is accepted and yields an empty StateUpdate.

nodes.name: test_write_todos_rejects_multiple_in_progress
nodes.summary: Verifies validation rejects more than one in_progress entry.

nodes.name: test_write_todos_rejects_invalid_status
nodes.summary: Verifies validation rejects statuses outside the pending/in_progress/completed enum.

nodes.name: test_write_todos_missing_todos_field
nodes.summary: Missing 'todos' field produces required-field error.

nodes.name: test_write_todos_missing_active_form_field
nodes.summary: Missing activeForm yields an 'invalid todos format' error.

nodes.name: test_write_todos_preserves_active_form_serde_rename
nodes.summary: Confirms camelCase activeForm maps to snake_case active_form via serde rename.

nodes.name: test_write_todos_all_completed
nodes.summary: Asserts a list with every entry completed is accepted.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for rvagent-wasm — cdylib+rlib crate using wasm-bindgen, js-sys, web-sys (Worker/Fetch features), sha3 for RVF checksums, and a research-tier permissive lints profile.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documentation for rvagent-wasm — describes WasmAgent, WasmMcpServer, WasmGallery, the virtual filesystem, available tools, MCP methods, build instructions, and security limits.

nodes.name: backends.rs
nodes.summary: WASM backend implementations: WasmStateBackend (in-memory virtual filesystem with size/path-traversal limits) and WasmFetchBackend (web-sys Fetch wrapper for remote file ops).

nodes.name: WasmStateBackend
nodes.summary: In-memory HashMap-backed virtual filesystem implementing read/write/edit/delete/list with size, count, and path-traversal guards.

nodes.name: WasmFetchBackend
nodes.summary: Backend that uses global fetch (Window or Worker) to GET/PUT files from a base URL with optional Authorization header.

nodes.name: WasmBackendError
nodes.summary: thiserror enum: NotFound, EditMismatch, Serialization, FetchError, SecurityError, LimitExceeded; also has From<_> for JsValue.

nodes.name: normalize_path
nodes.summary: Helper that strips leading './', collapses '//', enforces MAX_PATH_LENGTH, blocks '..' traversal, and rejects suspicious /etc paths.

nodes.name: bridge.rs
nodes.summary: JS interop bridge — JsModelProvider wraps a JS async function for model calls, plus conversion helpers (to_js_value/from_js_value, field accessors) and BridgeMessage role/content type.

nodes.name: JsModelProvider
nodes.summary: wasm_bindgen struct wrapping a js_sys::Function callback that resolves a Promise<string> for model completions.

nodes.name: BridgeMessage
nodes.summary: Role+content message type with system/user/assistant constructors for bridge communication with JS providers.

nodes.name: to_js_value
nodes.summary: Generic serializer: serde Serialize -> JSON string -> JS object via JSON.parse.

nodes.name: from_js_value
nodes.summary: Generic deserializer: JsValue -> JSON string -> Rust T.

nodes.name: get_string_field
nodes.summary: Reflect.get + as_string helper for required string fields on a JS object.

nodes.name: js_object
nodes.summary: Builds a JS object from string key/value pairs via Reflect.set.

nodes.name: gallery.rs
nodes.summary: RVF App Gallery — exports WasmGallery wasm-bindgen type with six built-in templates (coder/researcher/tester/reviewer/security/swarm-orchestrator), search/configure/RVF-export APIs, and custom template import with security limits.

nodes.name: TemplateCategory
nodes.summary: Category enum (Development/Research/Testing/Documentation/DevOps/Security/Orchestration/Custom) with snake_case serde.

nodes.name: GalleryTemplate
nodes.summary: A complete agent template with tools, prompts, skills, MCP tools, capabilities, orchestrator config, and to_rvf() conversion.

nodes.name: SearchResult
nodes.summary: Gallery search result with id, name, description, category, tags, and relevance score.

nodes.name: WasmGallery
nodes.summary: wasm_bindgen-exported gallery manager — holds builtin + custom templates, the active template id, and configuration overrides.

nodes.name: coder_template
nodes.summary: Builds the Coder Agent template (file_read/write capabilities, refactor/explain skills, read/write/edit MCP tools).

nodes.name: researcher_template
nodes.summary: Builds the Research Agent template with web_search/summarize tools and deep_dive skill.

nodes.name: tester_template
nodes.summary: Builds the Testing Agent template with generate_tests tool and coverage skill.

nodes.name: reviewer_template
nodes.summary: Builds the Code Review Agent template with review_diff tool and security_audit skill.

nodes.name: security_template
nodes.summary: Builds the Security Agent template with scan_vulnerabilities tool and threat_model skill.

nodes.name: swarm_orchestrator_template
nodes.summary: Builds the Swarm Orchestrator template — a hierarchical multi-agent topology with queen + coder/tester/reviewer nodes.

nodes.name: builtin_templates
nodes.summary: Returns the Vec of all six built-in GalleryTemplate values.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Crate root for rvagent-wasm — declares modules (backends/bridge/gallery/mcp/rvf/tools), defines WasmAgentConfig, AgentState, and the wasm_bindgen-exported WasmAgent with prompt/execute_tool/state APIs.

nodes.name: backends
nodes.summary: Module declaration for the WASM backends submodule.

nodes.name: bridge
nodes.summary: Module declaration for the JS interop bridge submodule.

nodes.name: gallery
nodes.summary: Module declaration for the RVF gallery submodule.

nodes.name: mcp
nodes.summary: Module declaration for the WASM MCP server submodule.

nodes.name: rvf
nodes.summary: Module declaration for the RVF container support submodule.

nodes.name: tools
nodes.summary: Module declaration for the WASM tools submodule.

nodes.name: WasmAgentConfig
nodes.summary: Serde config parsed from a host JSON string: model, optional name, instructions, and max_turns with defaults.

nodes.name: AgentState
nodes.summary: Serializable agent state — messages, turn_count, and stopped flag.

nodes.name: WasmAgent
nodes.summary: Main wasm_bindgen-exported agent type — owns config, state, virtual filesystem backend, todos, and optional JS model provider.

nodes.name: mcp.rs
nodes.summary: WASM MCP server — implements JSON-RPC 2.0 with MCP methods (initialize/ping/tools/resources/prompts) and gallery methods (list/search/get/load/configure/categories), wrapping the same backend+tools used by WasmAgent.

nodes.name: McpToolDef
nodes.summary: MCP tool definition record (name, description, inputSchema) for tools/list responses.

nodes.name: JsonRpcRequest
nodes.summary: JSON-RPC 2.0 request type with id, method, params.

nodes.name: JsonRpcResponse
nodes.summary: JSON-RPC 2.0 response with success()/error() constructors.

nodes.name: JsonRpcError
nodes.summary: JSON-RPC error body (code, message, optional data).

nodes.name: ServerCapabilities
nodes.summary: MCP initialize capability advertisement (tools, resources).

nodes.name: ToolCapabilities
nodes.summary: Tools capability flags.

nodes.name: ResourceCapabilities
nodes.summary: Resources capability flags.

nodes.name: WasmMcpServer
nodes.summary: wasm_bindgen MCP server owning a WasmStateBackend, todos, gallery, and an initialized flag — entry point is handle_request().

nodes.name: rvf.rs
nodes.summary: RVF (RuVector Format) cognitive container support — defines segment/tag layout, the WasmRvfBuilder wasm-bindgen type, ParsedContainer, SHA3-256 checksum verification, and security limits including delegation depth caps.

nodes.name: SegmentType
nodes.summary: Repr-u8 RVF segment type tags (Header/Metadata/Code/Data/Weights/Config/Manifest/Signature/Checkpoint/Witness/Profile).

nodes.name: RvfError
nodes.summary: RVF error variants for invalid magic, checksum mismatch, segment errors, size overflows, and security violations.

nodes.name: ToolDefinition
nodes.summary: Container-level tool definition (name, description, JSON parameters schema, optional returns).

nodes.name: AgentPrompt
nodes.summary: Named system prompt with version.

nodes.name: SkillDefinition
nodes.summary: Skill record (name, description, trigger phrase, content body).

nodes.name: OrchestratorConfig
nodes.summary: Topology metadata (topology string, agent nodes, directed connection pairs).

nodes.name: AgentNode
nodes.summary: An agent participant in a topology with id, agent_type, and prompt_ref.

nodes.name: McpToolEntry
nodes.summary: MCP tool descriptor stored inside an RVF container.

nodes.name: CapabilityDef
nodes.summary: Ruvix-compatible capability descriptor (rights, scope, delegation_depth).

nodes.name: ParsedContainer
nodes.summary: Fully parsed RVF payload — bundles tools, prompts, skills, optional orchestrator, mcp_tools, and capabilities.

nodes.name: WasmRvfBuilder
nodes.summary: wasm_bindgen RVF builder/parser — accumulates segments and emits Uint8Array containers with SHA3-256 checksums; also exposes parse/validate/getMagic statics.

nodes.name: tools.rs
nodes.summary: WASM-compatible tool subset — defines ToolRequest enum, TodoItem/TodoStatus, ToolResult, and WasmToolExecutor that dispatches read/write/edit/list/write_todos against an in-memory WasmStateBackend (OS-level execute/glob/grep are intentionally omitted).

nodes.name: ToolRequest
nodes.summary: serde-tagged enum of tool invocations (ReadFile/WriteFile/EditFile/WriteTodos/ListFiles).

nodes.name: TodoItem
nodes.summary: WASM-side todo entry with content and TodoStatus.

nodes.name: TodoStatus
nodes.summary: Status enum (Pending/InProgress/Completed) with snake_case serde.

nodes.name: ToolResult
nodes.summary: Boolean success flag plus output string returned by every tool invocation.

nodes.name: WasmToolExecutor
nodes.summary: Borrowed executor that mutates a WasmStateBackend and todo list to fulfill ToolRequest variants.

nodes.name: parse_tool_request
nodes.summary: Parse a JSON string into a ToolRequest with a friendly error.

nodes.name: tool_result_to_json
nodes.summary: Serialize a ToolResult to JSON.

nodes.name: available_tools
nodes.summary: Returns the five tool names available in the WASM environment.
